{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315153642ED1792ED73CB8AA67D"}"},"total":40},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601385381943558936","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在我看来还不错吧，算是原神和崩铁融合不错的文了，角色也没怎么OOC，战力方面也没崩，就是前期主角没啥存在感，基本都走的原神剧情，不过我建议还是主观影吧，因为观影放的本来就是有主角参与后的剧情了，你现实又根据这个再重新安排一遍，双线展开容易让读者看得很混乱。中间有的时候很容易看着看着，不知道是在观影还是在讲现实。但是也还是很可以了，毕竟这种原神和崩铁融合的好的文真的很少了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769838435,"group_id":"7487828407221226520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/mk+VxzjpEMHXIqYyXmgss=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9384992690a14d3dac0000f4e48aa931~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795207&x-signature=tkaGjhDKjWIDLSrvnGehKKjB8Xk%3D","user_id":"110404506227080","user_name":"韺櫂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110404506227080","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7487828407221226520","book_info":{"abstract":"原神天幕+崩铁敌对物种卡池
无CP，嗑CP，空厨，不抽流莹和卡芙卡
穿着一身睡衣的凌明懵逼的看着眼前头戴面具的黑色人形生物。
“丘丘人？”
不知该说幸运还是不幸，凌明带着一个崩铁的抽卡页面穿越到了提瓦特。
望着末日兽以及虚妄之母，他陷入沉思。
“我不知道我为什么要来，我怎么来，我只知道我该把这一切掀得天翻地覆（不是）。”
“然后想办法去崩铁巡猎。”
“但…”望着面前播放足迹的光屏，他陷入了沉思
“这又是什么情况？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o377be422970da0b7c3c6144115971c25~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月隐月现","author_id":"","book_id":"7487828407221226520","book_name":"原神天幕：我能抽取崩铁物种","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c08848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2862人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":57,"name":"游戏动漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=57&name=游戏动漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7487833437879468568","read_count":"2862","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"415547"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"178","tags":"传统玄幻,游戏动漫,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o377be422970da0b7c3c6144115971c25~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434136&x-signature=vkmHLL8b2OrOse499mBRORJNKd8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3079082819194004","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315153642ED1792ED73CB8AA67D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25082,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":196},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573348012740592446","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"找到一本好看的原崩文[赞][赞]要是大大勤快一点就更好了[求爆更][求爆更]
